channel.title: Roland Su
channel.description: Small essays on code, tools, and shipping.

item.title: Designing with constraints
item.description: How constraints shape better systems, clearer APIs, and more reliable code.

item.title: Static sites still matter
item.description: Why static sites are still a good default for small writing projects.

item.title: What I learned debugging builds
item.description: A short note about making build failures easier to understand.
